import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F


class EncBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=5, stride=2, padding=2),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_ch),
            nn.PReLU()
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.conv(x)


class DecBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch, skip_ch, final=False):
        super().__init__()
        self.up = nn.ConvTranspose2d(in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=5, stride=2,
                                     padding=2, output_padding=1)
        if not final:
            self.conv = nn.Sequential(
                nn.Conv2d(out_ch + skip_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=3, padding=1),
                nn.BatchNorm2d(out_ch),
                nn.PReLU()
            )
        else:
            self.conv = nn.Conv2d(out_ch + skip_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=3, padding=1)
    
    def forward(self, x, skip):
        x = self.up(x)
        # Match spatial dimensions (handle off-by-one from rounding)
        x = x[:, :, :skip.shape[2], :skip.shape[3]]
        x = torch.cat([x, skip], dim=1)
        x = self.conv(x)
        return x


class FreqCRN(nn.Module):
    """
    Frequency-domain Convolutional Recurrent Network for Speech Enhancement.
    Processes complex STFT (real + imaginary as 2 channels).
    Estimates a complex ratio mask.
    """
    def __init__(self, n_fft=512, hop_length=128):
        super().__init__()
        self.n_fft = n_fft
        self.hop_length = hop_length
        self.freq_bins = n_fft // 2 + 1  # 257
        self.pad_freq = 272  # 17 * 16, next multiple of 16 above 257
        
        # Encoder
        self.enc1 = EncBlock(2, 32)     # [B, 32, 136, T/2]
        self.enc2 = EncBlock(32, 64)    # [B, 64, 68, T/4]
        self.enc3 = EncBlock(64, 128)   # [B, 128, 34, T/8]
        self.enc4 = EncBlock(128, 256)  # [B, 256, 17, T/16]
        
        # LSTM bottleneck with projections
        self.enc_out_dim = 256 * 17  # 4352
        self.lstm_hidden = 256
        
        self.pre_lstm = nn.Linear(self.enc_out_dim, self.lstm_hidden)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(self.lstm_hidden, self.lstm_hidden, num_layers=2,
                           batch_first=True, bidirectional=True)
        self.post_lstm = nn.Linear(self.lstm_hidden * 2, self.enc_out_dim)
        
        # Decoder with skip connections
        self.dec4 = DecBlock(256, 128, skip_ch=128)   # skip from enc3
        self.dec3 = DecBlock(128, 64, skip_ch=64)     # skip from enc2
        self.dec2 = DecBlock(64, 32, skip_ch=32)      # skip from enc1
        self.dec1 = DecBlock(32, 2, skip_ch=2, final=True)  # skip from input
    
    def forward(self, waveform):
        device = waveform.device
        B, L = waveform.shape
        
        # Compute STFT
        window = torch.hann_window(self.n_fft, device=device)
        stft = torch.stft(waveform, n_fft=self.n_fft, hop_length=self.hop_length,
                          window=window, return_complex=True)
        # stft: [B, F, T]
        
        # Stack real and imaginary
        x = torch.stack([stft.real, stft.imag], dim=1)  # [B, 2, F, T]
        
        orig_F, orig_T = x.shape[2], x.shape[3]
        
        # Pad frequency to pad_freq and time to multiple of 16
        pad_f = self.pad_freq - x.shape[2]
        pad_t = (16 - x.shape[3] % 16) % 16
        if pad_f > 0 or pad_t > 0:
            x = F.pad(x, (0, pad_t, 0, pad_f))
        
        # Encoder
        e1 = self.enc1(x)     # [B, 32, 136, T/2]
        e2 = self.enc2(e1)    # [B, 64, 68, T/4]
        e3 = self.enc3(e2)    # [B, 128, 34, T/8]
        e4 = self.enc4(e3)    # [B, 256, 17, T/16]
        
        # LSTM
        B_e, C_e, F_e, T_e = e4.shape
        lstm_in = e4.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).reshape(B_e, T_e, -1)  # [B, T_e, C_e*F_e]
        lstm_in = self.pre_lstm(lstm_in)  # [B, T_e, lstm_hidden]
        lstm_out, _ = self.lstm(lstm_in)  # [B, T_e, lstm_hidden*2]
        lstm_out = self.post_lstm(lstm_out)  # [B, T_e, enc_out_dim]
        lstm_out = lstm_out.reshape(B_e, T_e, C_e, F_e).permute(0, 2, 3, 1)  # [B, C_e, F_e, T_e]
        
        # Decoder with skip connections
        d4 = self.dec4(lstm_out, e3)   # [B, 128, 34, T/8]
        d3 = self.dec3(d4, e2)          # [B, 64, 68, T/4]
        d2 = self.dec2(d3, e1)          # [B, 32, 136, T/2]
        d1 = self.dec1(d2, x)           # [B, 2, 272, T]
        
        # Crop to original STFT size
        mask = d1[:, :, :orig_F, :orig_T]
        
        # Apply tanh activation for bounded complex mask
        mask = torch.tanh(mask)
        
        # Convert to complex mask
        mask_complex = torch.complex(mask[:, 0], mask[:, 1])  # [B, F, T]
        
        # Apply mask
        enhanced_stft = stft * mask_complex
        
        # iSTFT
        enhanced = torch.istft(enhanced_stft, n_fft=self.n_fft, hop_length=self.hop_length,
                               window=window, length=L)
        return enhanced
